message:
feat(scheduler): implement Decision Contract for Bayesian action selection (bd-1e2if.6)

Add SchedulerDecisionContract implementing franken_decision::DecisionContract
with 4-state (healthy/congested/unstable/partitioned) x 3-action
(aggressive/balanced/conservative) loss matrix. Posterior is updated from
StateSnapshot likelihoods and used to select Bayes-optimal scheduling posture
in governor_suggest(). Decision audit entries are emitted as EvidenceLedger
entries for offline replay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
